rag_rules: AGREE contracts must be placed inside annex agree blocks scoped to their owning component declaration
Use assign statements only for implementation-level output bindings with visible features
generic_rules: Assumptions and guarantees must reference only identifiers visible in the current component scope
Component type contracts should relate inputs to outputs using visible feature names
Constants and equations in AGREE must be declared with proper types and values
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE syntax uses assume/guarantee labels with colons and semicolons
Implementation contracts use assign for output feature bindings
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL properties like Deadline or Period as AGREE variables
Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
